ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the task */,
  "task_subject" TEXT /* Subject or title of the task */,
  "assigned_employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date and time the task was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Actions that can be performed on the task (e.g., Update, Delete) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "estimated_hours" TEXT /* Estimated hours to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" TEXT /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the task */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that is being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Employee who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the task */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the history record */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Update, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update regarding project progress */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Milestone, Progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role responsibilities */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the notification */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Reminder, Update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag's purpose */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the tag for better visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_tags" (
  "task_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task-tag mapping */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag assigned to the task */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the task-tag mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file uploaded as an attachment */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the attachment */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, PNG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
